nonGoals: Do NOT create docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md (forward-looking reference only)
Do NOT create a standalone SSML doc
Do NOT include per-provider tables or exhaustive catalog data
Do NOT change any source code, configuration, or CI
objective: Create docs/GLOSSARY.md with 9 integrator-facing core API term definitions (Provider, Provider ID, Voice, Dialect, Catalog, Capability, Job, SSML tag, Steering), each 1–3 sentences, with forward-looking cross-links to docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md and docs/DISCOVERY.md#ssml-editor.
planText: Create a new file `docs/GLOSSARY.md`. Write a title (`# Glossary`), a one-sentence preamble, then 9 sections — one per term — each with the term as a heading and 1–3 sentences of descriptive, integrator-facing prose grounded in the project's actual models (SCHEMA.md, SYNTHESIS_API.md, DISCOVERY.md). For Provider ID, include a forward-looking cross-link to `docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md`. For SSML tag, cross-link to `docs/DISCOVERY.md#ssml-editor`. No code changes, no tables, no exhaustive provider lists.

nonGoals: Do NOT reorder or reword any existing README sections or bullets
Do NOT add glossary content to README itself
Do NOT change any source code, configuration, or CI
objective: Add a one-line glossary pointer to README.md's Product Docs bullet list.
planText: In `README.md`, locate the `## Product Docs` section and its bullet list. Add a new bullet `- Glossary: [docs/GLOSSARY.md](docs/GLOSSARY.md)` (or the project's existing link style) among the existing documentation links. Ensure the link is consistent with the other bullet entries in that list.
